title: Panthers Announce Atrium Health Training Facility
summary: Carolina Panthers partner with Atrium Health for a new training facility, expected to open before the 2027 training camp.
charlotte_impact: Enhances team resources and local healthcare partnership, boosting community ties and sports infrastructure.

title: Duke Energy Requests Rate Hike After Winter Demand
summary: Duke Energy seeks to recover $800 million in fuel costs due to extreme cold, potentially increasing customer bills.
charlotte_impact: Impacts household budgets and raises concerns about energy affordability during extreme weather events.

title: NC Cannabis Council Pushes Legalization
summary: Advisory group advocates for regulated marijuana market, which could significantly alter the landscape for existing dispensaries.
charlotte_impact: Potential economic and social shifts with new regulations impacting businesses and public policy.

title: Fatal Shooting in Southwest Charlotte
summary: A shooting on Forest Point Boulevard resulted in one death and two hospitalizations, increasing concerns about local safety.
charlotte_impact: Highlights ongoing issues with gun violence and public safety in residential areas.

title: Tragic Shooting Involving Pregnant Woman
summary: A pregnant woman accidentally shot herself, killing her unborn child; alleged gang member arrested.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the devastating consequences of gun violence and potential gang-related issues.

title: Gaston County Ambulance Involved in Crash
summary: An ambulance crash in Gaston County caused several injuries, prompting road closures and public safety concerns.
charlotte_impact: Disrupts emergency services and raises questions about road safety and emergency response protocols.

title: Charlotte Water Implements Voluntary Restrictions
summary: Charlotte Water urges customers to reduce water use due to drought conditions, aiming to protect the water supply.
charlotte_impact: Reflects growing environmental concerns and the need for water conservation during dry periods.

title: Severe Drought Grips the Carolinas
summary: Nearly 100% of the Carolinas are experiencing severe drought, the worst in NC since 2008 and SC since 2002.
charlotte_impact: Threatens agriculture, water resources, and ecosystems, requiring urgent mitigation strategies.

title: Child Overdoses on Meth; Parents Charged
summary: A 15-month-old overdosed on meth in Union County; the mother and boyfriend face charges related to drug exposure.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the severe risks of drug abuse and neglect impacting vulnerable children.

title: CMPD Reports Crime Drop, Homicide Increase
summary: Overall crime decreased by 23%, but homicides increased from 16 to 22 in the first quarter of 2026.
charlotte_impact: Presents a mixed picture of public safety, with progress in some areas offset by rising violent crime.

title: Crash Causes Delays on I-85 in Gaston County
summary: A crash near Kings Mountain on I-85 caused significant traffic delays, backing up traffic for nearly 10 miles.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the impact of traffic incidents on daily commutes and regional transportation.

title: Teen Charged in Deadly Gastonia Crash
summary: A teenager has been charged in connection with a fatal car crash that occurred along Shannon Bradley Road in Gastonia.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of reckless driving and the tragic consequences for all involved.

title: Record Heat and Dry Conditions Persist
summary: The area continues to experience record-breaking heat and very dry conditions, with no rain expected until Sunday.
charlotte_impact: Exacerbates drought conditions and increases the risk of heat-related illnesses and wildfires.

title: VERIFY: Water Restriction Decisions in Mecklenburg
summary: Charlotte Water will decide on potential water restrictions as extreme drought conditions persist in Mecklenburg County.
charlotte_impact: Clarifies the decision-making process for water restrictions during environmental emergencies.

title: Charlotte Transit Changes Ahead
summary: MPTA advances "Better Bus" program, promising shorter waits and improved service based on public input.
charlotte_impact: Aims to enhance public transportation and address commuter needs through service improvements.
